title: Resize Kanban Columns
excerpt: It would be great to be able to resize Kanban columns. I have a board where the item columns are basically checklist fields, and the Kanban board view being vertical makes it very easy. However, things are cut off. I’ve …

posts.author: Kelderic (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to resize Kanban columns. I have a board where the item columns are basically checklist fields, and the Kanban board view being vertical makes it very easy. However, things are cut off. I’ve had to manually edit the CSS to make it wider to I can see everything. It would be great to be able to change the width of the columns.

posts.author: dawnwrites (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this would be a great improvement. I’m surprised this hasn’t received more votes or replies. The columns are far too narrow in my opinion.

posts.author: Shiranos (Shiran Tal)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. Please add the option to resize ! they are too narrow

posts.author: marcepz (Ana Marcela Perez)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! I don’t know why this doesn’t have more votes. It’s very unusable right now, if you have more than a couple of items it makes the scrolling very annoying. We don’t use a ton of statuses in some boards, so we just get 3 or 4 neverending lists
